reference: Hello! It might be an infection of your kidneys or urinary tract as a complication of the throat infection from Streptococcus. You have to do a urine analysis and a throat culture, too. Antistreptolysins in the blood show if you have a Streptococcus infection. If yes, you have to take antibiotics. Thank you!
text: Hello. It might be an infection of your kidneys or urinary tract as a complication of the throat infection from Streptococcus. You have to do a urine analysis and a throat culture too. Anti-streptolysins in the blood show if you have a Streptococcus infection; if yes, you have to take antibiotics. Thank you.
